nodes.label: Beauty
nodes.description: Root taxonomy for the ecommerce beauty catalog.

nodes.label: Baby Care
nodes.description: Products specifically designed for infants and toddlers.

nodes.label: Baby Care
nodes.description: Baby shampoos, lotions, oils, wipes, and other bath and skin products for infants.

nodes.label: Beauty Tools
nodes.description: Non-makeup, non-hair tools and storage for beauty routines.

nodes.label: Cases and Storage
nodes.description: Makeup bags, train cases, travel bottles, magnetic palettes, organizers, and other beauty storage.

nodes.label: Facial Massagers
nodes.description: Gua sha, jade rollers, microcurrent devices, and other tools for facial massage and sculpting.

nodes.label: Mirrors and Misc Tools
nodes.description: Hand and lighted mirrors, magnifying mirrors, and miscellaneous beauty tools that do not fit other leaves.

nodes.label: Tool Cleaning
nodes.description: Brushes, sprays, mats, and solutions for cleaning makeup and beauty tools.

nodes.label: Tweezers and Extractors
nodes.description: Tweezers, blackhead extractors, comedone removers, and pore cleaning tools.

nodes.label: Body Care
nodes.description: Products for body hygiene, moisturizing, hair removal, and grooming.

nodes.label: Bath Soaks and Bubbles
nodes.description: Bath salts, Epsom salts, bath bombs, bubble bath, and other immersive bath products.

nodes.label: Body Lotions
nodes.description: Creams, butters, and lotions for body hydration.

nodes.label: Body Oils
nodes.description: Oils for moisturizing, massaging, and treating body skin.

nodes.label: Body Scrubs
nodes.description: Sugar, salt, and other exfoliating scrubs for body skin.

nodes.label: Body Wash and Soap
nodes.description: Bar soaps, liquid body washes, shower gels, and cleansing bars.

nodes.label: Deodorant
nodes.description: Antiperspirants, deodorants, and body odor products.

nodes.label: Hair Removal
nodes.description: Waxes, depilatory creams, sugaring kits, epilators, and tools for removing unwanted body hair.

nodes.label: Shaving and Grooming
nodes.description: Shave creams and gels, razors, aftershaves, beard balms, and men's grooming products.

nodes.label: Body Art
nodes.description: Temporary tattoos, body paint, and decorative body art products.

nodes.label: Body Paint and Glitter
nodes.description: Body paints, face paints, body glitter, body adhesives, and stencils for body art.

nodes.label: Temporary Tattoos
nodes.description: Temporary, henna, and metallic-foil tattoos for short-term skin decoration.

nodes.label: Fragrance
nodes.description: Perfumes, colognes, body mists, and other scented personal-care products.

nodes.label: Body Mist and Spray
nodes.description: Body sprays, body mists, roll-on perfumes, and lighter everyday-wear scented products.

nodes.label: Eau de Parfum and Cologne
nodes.description: Eau de parfum, eau de toilette, cologne, and concentrated fine fragrance.

nodes.label: Hair
nodes.description: Products for hair care, styling, color, extensions, wigs, and accessories.

nodes.label: Braiding Hair
nodes.description: Kanekalon, crochet hair, jumbo braid hair, and synthetic fibers for box braids and twists.

nodes.label: Clippers and Trimmers
nodes.description: Electric hair clippers, beard trimmers, and body trimmers.

nodes.label: Clips and Pins
nodes.description: Hair clips, claws, barrettes, bobby pins, scrunchies, banana clips, hair sticks, and other fastening accessories.

nodes.label: Hair Color
nodes.description: Temporary and permanent hair dyes, root touch-up products, color sprays, and bleaches.

nodes.label: Combs and Brushes
nodes.description: Non-heated detangling and styling tools: combs, picks, paddle brushes, foam rollers, hair scissors.

nodes.label: Conditioner and Treatments
nodes.description: Conditioners, leave-ins, hair masks, deep conditioners, and hair oils for moisturizing and repairing hair.

nodes.label: Extensions - Bundles and Weaves
nodes.description: Sewn-in and glued-in bundle hair, weft hair, lace closures, and frontals for salon-installed extensions.

nodes.label: Extensions - Clip and Tape
nodes.description: Clip-in, tape-in, and halo extensions, plus ponytail and bun hair pieces for DIY application.

nodes.label: Head Coverings
nodes.description: Bonnets, sleep caps, shower caps, durags, turbans, and wide headbands for hair protection and styling.

nodes.label: Shampoo and Styling
nodes.description: Shampoos, dry shampoos, gels, mousses, pomades, hair sprays, edge controls, and styling creams.

nodes.label: Styling Tools
nodes.description: Heated styling tools: curling irons, flat irons, hair dryers, hot rollers, and styling wands.

nodes.label: Wigs
nodes.description: Full wigs, half wigs, and hairpieces for full-coverage styling.

nodes.label: Makeup
nodes.description: Cosmetics for face, eyes, lips, and complexion.

nodes.label: Applicators
nodes.description: Makeup brushes, brush sets, beauty blenders, silicone applicators, and disposable applicator wands.

nodes.label: Eyebrow
nodes.description: Eyebrow pencils, powders, gels, waxes, stencils, and shaping tools.

nodes.label: Eyeliner
nodes.description: Liquid, pencil, gel, and felt-tip eyeliners and kohl.

nodes.label: Eyeshadow
nodes.description: Powder, cream, and stick pigments for coloring the eyelids; eyeshadow palettes.

nodes.label: Face Makeup
nodes.description: Blushes, bronzers, highlighters, contour sticks, and setting powders and sprays.

nodes.label: False Lashes
nodes.description: Strip lashes, individual lashes, lash glues, and salon-style eyelash extensions for cosmetic enhancement.

nodes.label: Foundations
nodes.description: Liquid, stick, cushion, and powder foundations, BB and CC creams, and concealers.

nodes.label: Lip Color
nodes.description: Lipsticks, lip glosses, lip liners, lip stains, and tinted lip balms.

nodes.label: Mascara
nodes.description: Mascaras for volumizing, lengthening, defining, and tinting lashes.

nodes.label: Primer
nodes.description: Face primers, pore-filling primers, and eyelid primers to smooth skin and extend makeup wear.

nodes.label: Nails
nodes.description: Products for fingernail and toenail care, polish, and art.

nodes.label: Manicure Tools
nodes.description: Nail files, buffers, cuticle pushers, nail clippers, and other manicure implements.

nodes.label: Nail Art
nodes.description: Nail stickers, foils, rhinestones, stamps, and other nail decorations.

nodes.label: Nail Polish
nodes.description: Liquid color coatings for nails, including gel polish, regular polish, base coats, top coats, and polish remover.

nodes.label: Nail Tips and Extensions
nodes.description: Artificial false nail tips, press-on nails, acrylic powders, gel kits, and dip powders.

nodes.label: Pedicure and Foot Care
nodes.description: Foot files, callus removers, toenail clippers, heel creams, toe separators, and foot spa tools.

nodes.label: Oral Care
nodes.description: Products for teeth and mouth hygiene.

nodes.label: Floss
nodes.description: Dental floss, floss picks, and interdental cleaners.

nodes.label: Toothbrushes
nodes.description: Manual and electric toothbrushes plus replacement heads.

nodes.label: Skin Care
nodes.description: Products for facial skin treatment, cleansing, moisturizing, sun protection, and targeted concerns.

nodes.label: Acne and Spot Treatments
nodes.description: Acne creams, sulfur and salicylic treatments, pimple patches, and targeted spot treatments.

nodes.label: Cleansers
nodes.description: Face washes, cleansing balms, micellar waters, makeup removers, and facial cleansing wipes.

nodes.label: Exfoliators and Peels
nodes.description: Chemical peels, AHA/BHA pads, face scrubs, and resurfacing treatments.

nodes.label: Eye Care
nodes.description: Eye creams, eye serums, eye masks, and under-eye patches.

nodes.label: Masks
nodes.description: Sheet masks, clay masks, peel-off masks, sleeping masks, and other face masks.

nodes.label: Moisturizers
nodes.description: Day creams, night creams, face lotions, hydrating gels, and facial moisturizers.

nodes.label: Serums and Essences
nodes.description: Concentrated treatments like vitamin C, retinol, hyaluronic acid, and niacinamide serums, plus essences and ampoules.

nodes.label: Sunscreen and After-Sun
nodes.description: SPF sunscreens, face and body sun protection, self-tanners, and after-sun soothing products.
